myUsageDescription: My AI tool usage and cost
loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to view your usage.
noCollectedUsageDescription: Install the shim to automatically collect claude/codex usage.
noMyUsageDescription: No usage for the selected period and tool.

pricingNotice.title: Model pricing is not synced, so costs show as $0.
pricingNotice.adminAction: Run pricing sync from <link>Admin → System</link>. Daily auto-refresh requires registering the sync-pricing cron (see the scheduler section in the README).
pricingNotice.memberAction: Ask an administrator to run pricing sync (sync-pricing).

history.title: My history
history.description: My prompts and responses — only you can see them
history.loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to view your history.
history.disabledDescription: Prompts and responses are stored once the server has a content encryption key (TOARD_CONTENT_KEK_B64).
history.emptyDescription: Turn on content collection in the shim (TOARD_SHIM_COLLECT_CONTENT=1) to see it here.
history.privacyNote: Only you can see this — administrators and other users cannot view this content.
history.noMatchDescription: Try adjusting the period or tool filter.
history.notFoundDescription: It may have been removed or is not accessible.
history.truncatedNote: Long conversation — showing the first {limit} turns.
